resources.title: Announcing Broadway
resources.description: Dashbit introduces Broadway, a higher-level abstraction over GenStage for building concurrent data ingestion pipelines.

resources.title: José Valim – Keynote: Announcing Broadway (ElixirConf EU)
resources.description: Keynote presentation introducing Broadway’s goals, architecture, and how it streamlines data processing in Elixir.

resources.title: How to Use Broadway in Your Elixir Application
resources.description: Strategies for reliability, batching and telemetry.
